description: Ground plane inside outer outline: grass for courtyard and surrounding ground within footprint.

operations.purpose: Ground plane inside outer outline: grass for courtyard and surrounding ground within footprint.
Low white block outline on ground surrounding the structure (single-layer border); overlaps outermost edge to match visible outline.
Continuous foundation / lower trim layer (stonebrick) one block high around full footprint to ground level base for walls and towers.
Ensure interior courtyard remains open (no floor fill) except the grass placed earlier; this is a no-op intended as a validation step.
Lower wall band: wood planks layer (mid band) starting at y=2 across wall footprint; this fills interior area but will be carved out by wall hollowing next—serves as consistent band level.

Carve interior of walls to create hollow enclosure interior up to y=5; ensures walls are layered and interior courtyard open. Implementation means leave walls 1 block thick with interior air where appropriate._outline_face_0

Carve interior of walls to create hollow enclosure interior up to y=5; ensures walls are layered and interior courtyard open. Implementation means leave walls 1 block thick with interior air where appropriate._outline_face_1

Carve interior of walls to create hollow enclosure interior up to y=5; ensures walls are layered and interior courtyard open. Implementation means leave walls 1 block thick with interior air where appropriate._outline_face_2

Carve interior of walls to create hollow enclosure interior up to y=5; ensures walls are layered and interior courtyard open. Implementation means leave walls 1 block thick with interior air where appropriate._outline_face_3

Carve interior of walls to create hollow enclosure interior up to y=5; ensures walls are layered and interior courtyard open. Implementation means leave walls 1 block thick with interior air where appropriate._outline_face_4

Carve interior of walls to create hollow enclosure interior up to y=5; ensures walls are layered and interior courtyard open. Implementation means leave walls 1 block thick with interior air where appropriate._outline_face_5
Top coping: stone slab rim around inner edge of wall (y=5) matching perimeter; forms upper rim above quartz trim.

Entrance opening centered on front short side: 4 blocks wide and 4 blocks tall (y=1..4) through the front tower/wall seam to allow direct access to courtyard. Ensures opening exists and is inside bbox.
Matching opening on rear short side tower/wall for symmetry (optional secondary entrance).
